hooks.command: cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" 2>/dev/null || exit 0; echo '[session context]'; git status -sb 2>/dev/null | head -15; echo '--- recent commits ---'; git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null; echo '--- open PRs ---'; gh pr list --limit 5 2>/dev/null || echo '(gh unavailable)'

INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE '"command"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*git push'; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" || exit 0; [ -d node_modules ] || { echo '[gate] node_modules missing; skipping local CI gates (CI still runs on the PR)' >&2; exit 0; }; npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run format:check && npm test || { echo 'CI gates failed (lint/typecheck/format/test). Fix before pushing.' >&2; exit 2; }; fi
hooks.statusMessage: Running CI gates before git push

hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE '"command"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*gh pr create'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"gh pr create just completed. Start a watcher now: invoke /loop with this prompt — watch PR #<N> CI + CodeRabbit status; report when all checks are terminal. Self-pace the polling. Read the PR number from the output URL (format: https://github.com/OWNER/REPO/pull/<N>)."}}'; fi

INPUT=$(cat); if echo "$INPUT" | grep -qE '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*(src/lib/sync\.ts|src/lib/storage\.ts|supabase/migrations/)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"You just edited a user-data-critical file (sync.ts, storage.ts, or a migration). Per CLAUDE.md Supabase safety: run the FULL e2e suite (not just the smoke-sync subset) before any push; re-read the affected migration end-to-end rather than trusting diffs; never run supabase db push (human gate). Past bugs in these files cost users recipes."}}'; fi
